evals.prompt: Create a script that generates a 3D tube following a Catmull-Rom spline path defined by 4 control points.
evals.expected_output: A script using VolumetricLine and spline math to update mesh geometry.
expectations: Includes a Catmull-Rom math function (or uses a library)
Generates intermediate points along the spline segment
Passes point array to the VolumetricLine custom component
Correctly sets the tubular radius and color parameters

evals.prompt: Implement a real-time 'trail' renderer that adds the user's hand position to a spline every frame and redraws the 3D line.
evals.expected_output: A script that manages a point buffer and triggers a redraw of the volumetric mesh.
expectations: Maintains an array of vec3 points
Pushes current hand position to the array in an UpdateEvent
Triggers a 'rebuild' or 'updateData' on the VolumetricLine component
Includes a limit to the number of points (buffer management) to prevent memory issues
